text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! All right, Brian, now be good and come
with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch. What are you playing at?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I've got a message from Air Groove. "We
both know damn well you can finish that job
today, so get to it, you procrastinator." Chop
chop!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I refuse. Rudolf said the deadline's flexible, so
there's still time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If I finish this one early, they'll just pile on extra
errands. There's nothing in it for me, so why
bother?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
I see... Well then, let's incentivize doing things
early!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
From now on, when you wrap up tasks early, I'll
give you a little treat! ♪ What should the treat
be? Coupons for extra meat?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hang on, don't get too excited. I never said I'd—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Ooor, how about a coupon for less veggies? A
coupon for a pair run with me? Or maybe a
coupon to let one little thing slide?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. So, what do you think? Why not wrap up
that little task real quick and give the coupon
thing a try?
